AI&DS

# Artificial Intelligence & Data Science

Established 2021

[Faculty](/departments/ai-ds/faculty)[Apply Now](/admissions)

## Vision & Mission

### Vision

To be a premier center for AI and data science education, producing industry-ready data professionals.

### Mission

* Deliver comprehensive education in AI and data science
* Encourage research in big data analytics and predictive modeling
* Build strong analytical and problem-solving skills
* Foster partnerships with data-driven industries

## Programs Offered

### B.E. Artificial Intelligence & Data Science

Duration: 4 yearsIntake: 60

## Labs & Facilities

### Laboratories

* Data Analytics Lab
* Big Data Lab
* AI Lab
* Statistics Lab
* Visualization Lab
* Cloud Computing Lab
